discussion_comments.comment_body: Resolved in 8299d48b: SIGKILL escalation timers are now tracked, cleared before rescheduling and during cleanup, and unref()d so they do not keep the worker alive.

Resolved in 8299d48b: terminal handling now listens for close instead of exit so final stdout/stderr buffers are flushed before yielding the result. Added a regression test where exit fires before stream end.
